sprint: Kid's Journey Review -- Screen 1 Polish Pass
task: Real, screen-by-screen product feedback: 'the screen needs to be more lively. why do we have ? on top right. the bottom 2 options are not visualize properly.' The '?' was genuinely dead for the primary audience -- a plain HTML title tooltip that never fires on a touch device -- fixed into a real tap-to-open popover with the same friendly orientation line. The bottom two options each rendered as an independent, identically-styled flat grey bar with its own divider -- fixed with a shared icon-circle+title+chevron toggle builder, grouped under one 'Already have something?' section with two distinctly-accented peer cards (violet for Vihu Card redeem, gold for Magic Card recall) laid out side by side. 'More lively' addressed with a staggered rise-and-fade entrance for the six Creation Type cards plus a genuine icon-level hover reaction, both respecting prefers-reduced-motion. Verified via a new 11-assertion Playwright suite plus full regression across the entire Magic Card/Vihu Card/Creator Playwright suite and both goldenBuild.js suites, all passing unchanged. docs/KID_JOURNEY.md's Screen 1 screenshot and description were regenerated/updated to match, since it's meant to stay in sync with real product changes.
